title: Register GitHub webhook and save response to repository
job:
Execute a curl POST request to register a webhook on the GitHub repository.

Use the following command:
curl -X POST \
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GH_TOKEN" \
  -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
  -d '{"name":"web","active":true,"events":["push","pull_request","issue_comment"],"config":{"url":"https://955e-34-45-177-168.ngrok-free.app/api/webhook/github","content_type":"json","insecure_ssl":"0"}}' \
  https://api.github.com/repos/StarkDopeDaemon/Dopebot/hooks

Capture the full JSON response from GitHub and write it to a file named `webhook-registration-response.json` in the root directory of the repository.

Then commit this file with the message "docs: GitHub webhook registration response".
